name: Carriage Station
description:
You notice something diferent from the rest of the street and of the city,
and is that it has some white metal benches, where some people can rest
while their wait for a carriage to pass. You notice a small sign, maybe
you should read it. From here you can go back north, or enter in a small
streech, and dark tunnel that is at the east.

extra_descriptions.description:
PRICES FOR SERVISES
To the down town of Lyon       $50 gold coins
To the down town of Paris      $85 gold coins
